home.result.usePincode: We couldn't place that address for certain — try your 6-digit pincode instead.

legal.courtesyNote: This is a courtesy translation. The English version of this page is the legally controlling text.

__hints.common.opensInNewTab: aria-label on the external-link glyph next to a guided link-out button (design-system.md §7.13) — the glyph itself, not visually-hidden companion text.
__hints.common.officialLinkPending: Visible note shown next to a guided link-out button whose official URL has not been filled into app_settings yet (dependency register §4.8) — never invent a URL, show this instead.
__hints.checkRegistration.linkOut.label: Button label for the guided link-out to the official EC/CEO Karnataka electoral roll lookup on /check-registration.
__hints.voterId.form6.label: Button label for the guided link-out to the official Form 6 (new voter enrolment) process on /voting-guide/voter-id.
__hints.voterId.form8.label: Button label for the guided link-out to the official Form 8 (update/transfer) process on /voting-guide/voter-id.
__hints.findBooth.form.label: Label on the /voting-guide/find-booth address input, same pattern as home.form.label.
__hints.findBooth.form.submit: Submit button label on the /voting-guide/find-booth address form.
__hints.findBooth.result.boothLabel: aria-label on the rendered polling-booth result (name + address) on /voting-guide/find-booth.
__hints.findBooth.result.noBoothData: Shown when booth-level data has not been loaded yet for the resolved ward (or at all) — PRD §5.10's guided link-out state, points the visitor at the official booth finder further down the page.
__hints.findBooth.result.unavailable: Shown when the address lookup itself failed/was ambiguous/hit budget (no pincode fallback for booths, unlike the ward finder).
__hints.findBooth.linkOut.heading: Heading above the always-visible guided link-out to the official EC booth finder on /voting-guide/find-booth — the no-JS fallback (PRD §5.10).
__hints.findBooth.linkOut.label: Button label for the guided link-out to the official EC/CEO Karnataka polling booth finder.
__hints.votingGuide.steps.heading: Heading above the 6-step deep-link checklist on /voting-guide (PRD §5.17) — distinct from the in-content '## What do I need to do before election day?' prose heading.
__hints.votingGuide.steps.findWard: Step 3 deep-link label on /voting-guide, to '/' (the ward finder).
__hints.votingGuide.steps.readCandidates: Step 4 deep-link label on /voting-guide — candidate report cards are per-ward, so this also links to '/' (find your ward first).
__hints.common.notDeclared: Shown in place of a candidate field the candidate has not filled in — neutral, not accusatory.
__hints.common.source.curator: Distinguish from official/affidavit sources — this is our editorial team's compiled context, not a government document.
__hints.common.flagError: Action label on the button citizens tap to report incorrect info on any field.
__hints.common.deadlineBanner.defaultLabel: Default label on the statutory-deadline countdown banner (design-system.md §7.6); a specific page may override with its own label key, e.g. voter-registration roll closure.
__hints.common.deadlineBanner.daysLeft: The countdown figure suffix, e.g. '12 days left' — {days} is a plain integer, not localized-plural-aware yet (MVP).
__hints.common.badge.flagPending: Status chip on a citizen's own flagged-correction list (/account/submissions) while a curator has not yet acted on it.
__hints.common.badge.flagAccepted: Status chip when a curator accepted and published the citizen's flagged correction.
__hints.common.badge.flagRejected: Status chip when a curator reviewed and rejected the citizen's flagged correction.
__hints.common.badge.wardReady: Curator/admin chip: this ward's report cards meet the publish-readiness bar.
__hints.common.badge.wardHeld: Curator/admin chip: this ward is missing required data and is held back from readiness — a work state, not an error (design-system.md §7.13).
__hints.home.meta.title: Browser tab title / <title> for the Home page ('/', '/kn/').
__hints.home.hero.heading: Home page H1 above the ward search form.
__hints.home.form.label: Label on the Home ward-search input, which accepts either a free-text address or a 6-digit pincode.
__hints.home.form.helper: Helper text under the address input clarifying the pincode fallback path (PRD §5.1).
__hints.home.result.shortlistHeading: Shown above the list of ward links when a pincode maps to more than one ward.
__hints.home.result.outOfCoverage: Shown when an address or pincode resolves outside the GBA area — an explicit answer, not an error (PRD §5.1).
__hints.home.result.usePincode: Shown when address geocoding was ambiguous, budget-exhausted, or failed and the citizen is nudged to the pincode fallback instead.
__hints.home.election.awaited: Home page election-status banner before the notification date is set in app_settings — one Home page, no separate pre-notification variant (IA §3.1).
__hints.home.election.status: Home page election-status line once both notification_date and election_date are set in app_settings; {notificationDate} and {electionDate} are the raw stored date strings.
__hints.home.shortcuts.checkRegistration.descrip: Subtext under the Home page shortcut card linking to /check-registration.
__hints.ward.meta.title: Browser tab title for the ward result page (/ward/{id}); {wardName} is the ward's name in the page's own language, {wardId} is the plain numeric wards.id.
__hints.ward.meta.description: Meta description for the ward result page.
__hints.ward.heading.wardNumber: Small label next to the ward name on the ward result page H1, e.g. 'Ward 57' — {wardId} is the plain numeric wards.id, not translated/formatted further.
__hints.ward.corporation.north: Display label for the 'north' corporation enum value (IA §3.2: ward name + number + corporation, N/S/E/W/Central) — kept as a short direction word, not the full 'Bengaluru North' corporation name.
__hints.ward.corporation.south: Display label for the 'south' corporation enum value — see ward.corporation.north.
__hints.ward.corporation.east: Display label for the 'east' corporation enum value — see ward.corporation.north.
__hints.ward.corporation.west: Display label for the 'west' corporation enum value — see ward.corporation.north.
__hints.ward.corporation.central: Display label for the 'central' corporation enum value — see ward.corporation.north.
__hints.ward.map.label: aria-label on the ward result page's boundary-map section.
__hints.ward.map.fallback: Static text inside the WardMap island's container, shown until (or unless) MapLibre replaces it — the no-JS/JS-failure fallback for design-system.md §8's boundary map.
__hints.ward.links.label: aria-label on the ward result page's nav of links to the candidates/issues/voting-guide subpages.
__hints.ward.links.candidates: Link label on the ward result page to /ward/{id}/candidates (IA §3.3).
__hints.ward.links.issues: Link label on the ward result page to /ward/{id}/issues (IA §3.6).
__hints.ward.notFound.fact: Defensive-only fallback fact (EmptyState) if Ward.astro is ever reached with an id its own route twin failed to 404 for — not a path any test exercises (the twins 404 first).
__hints.ward.issues.meta.title: Browser tab title for the ward issues page (/ward/{id}/issues); {wardName} is the ward's name in the page's own language.
__hints.ward.issues.meta.description: Meta description for the ward issues page.
__hints.ward.issues.subheading: Small label under the ward name on the ward issues page H1, matching the ward result page's corporation-label treatment.
__hints.ward.issues.empty.fact: EmptyState fact when a ward has no curator-defined issues yet (PRD §13.1 Phase 1 — issues/voting ship before candidate data).
__hints.ward.issues.empty.nextStep: EmptyState next-step text paired with ward.issues.empty.fact.
__hints.ward.issues.list.label: aria-label on the ward issues page's list of curator-defined issues.
__hints.ward.issues.item.stancesLabel: aria-label on the list of candidate stances shown under each issue (IA §3.6) — omitted when an issue has no stances yet.
__hints.ward.issues.results.label: aria-label on the public issue-vote results section (IssueBars) — ranked order with percentage shares only, no raw counts (PRD §5.5).
__hints.ward.issues.results.heading: Visible heading above the public issue-vote results (IssueBars).
__hints.legal.courtesyNote: Courtesy-translation notice (PRD §5.16) shown ONLY on the Kannada /terms and /privacy pages, never on English or /about — states the English version of the legal page is the legally controlling text and the Kannada version is a courtesy translation. Rendered as a notice Banner at the top of the page.
